The '''Imperial Ministry of Propaganda''' was an organization responsible for the creation and dissemination of various [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Propaganda/Legends|propaganda]] intended to glorify the Empire or cover up its atrocities.

The Imperial Ministry of Propaganda often used [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]], in propaganda.

It was the Ministry of Propaganda that came up with the term "[[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]]" for the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Expeditionary Battle Planetoid Development Initiative]].

{{Imp-stub}}
